title: Emergency Procedures for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: Activation of emergency alarm or notification of an emergency situation within the hotel premises.

steps.title: Activate Emergency Alarm
steps.action: Immediately activate the emergency alarm system to alert all guests and staff of the emergency situation.

steps.title: Contact Emergency Services
steps.action: Call the local emergency services (e.g., police, fire department, ambulance) and provide details of the emergency, including location, nature of the emergency, and any injuries.

steps.title: Evacuate Guests and Staff
steps.action: Guide all guests and staff to the nearest emergency exits and ensure they proceed to the designated assembly points. Use the hotel's evacuation plan to assist in directing traffic.

steps.title: Conduct Roll Call
steps.action: At the assembly points, conduct a roll call to ensure all guests and staff are accounted for. Use the guest registry and staff attendance records to verify.

next_steps.condition: If any person is unaccounted for
If all persons are accounted for

steps.title: Search for Missing Persons
steps.action: Coordinate with emergency services to search for any missing persons within the hotel premises. Provide last known locations and descriptions if available.

steps.title: Provide First Aid
steps.action: Administer first aid to any injured persons at the assembly points until emergency medical services arrive. Use the hotel's first aid kits and trained personnel.

steps.title: Communicate with Guests
steps.action: Provide updates to guests regarding the situation, ensuring clear communication about safety measures and expected timelines for resolution.

description: This playbook outlines the emergency procedures for hotels in Egypt, detailing the steps to be taken in the event of an emergency to ensure the safety of guests and staff.
escalation_path: If the situation escalates beyond control, contact the regional operations director for further instructions.
